class=\"menu__link\" href=\"/Contribute\"><span title=\"Contribution guidelines\" class=\"linkLabel_WmDU\">Contribution guidelines</span></a></li><li class=\"theme-doc-sidebar-item-link theme-doc-sidebar-item-link-level-1 menu__list-item\"><a class=\"menu__link\" href=\"/analytics-telemetry\"><span title=\"Analytics and Telemetry\" class=\"linkLabel_WmDU\">Analytics and Telemetry</span></a></li><li class=\"theme-doc-sidebar-item-category theme-doc-sidebar-item-category-level-1 menu__list-item menu__list-item--collapsed\"><div class=\"menu__list-item-collapsible\"><a href=\"#\" class=\"categoryLink_byQd menu__link menu__link--sublist menu__link--sublist-caret\" role=\"button\" aria-expanded=\"false\"><span title=\"Advanced Configuration\" class=\"categoryLinkLabel_W154\">Advanced Configuration</span></a></div></li></ul></nav></div></div></aside><main class=\"docMainContainer_TBSr\"><div class=\"container padding-top--md padding-bottom--lg\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col docItemCol_VOVn\"><div class=\"docItemContainer_Djhp\"><article><nav class=\"theme-doc-breadcrumbs breadcrumbsContainer_Z_bl\" aria-label=\"Breadcrumbs\"><ul class=\"breadcrumbs\"><li class=\"breadcrumbs__item\"><a aria-label=\"Home page\" class=\"breadcrumbs__link\" href=\"/\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" class=\"breadcrumbHomeIcon_YNFT\"><path d=\"M10 19v-5h4v5c0 .55.45 1 1 1h3c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-7h1.7c.46 0 .68-.57.33-.87L12.67 3.6c-.38-.34-.96-.34-1.34 0l-8.36 7.53c-.34.3-.13.87.33.87H5v7c0 .55.45 1 1 1h3c.55 0 1-.45 1-1z\" fill=\"currentColor\"></path></svg></a></li><li class=\"breadcrumbs__item breadcrumbs__item--active\"><span class=\"breadcrumbs__link\">Getting Started</span></li></ul></nav><div class=\"tocCollapsible_ETCw theme-doc-toc-mobile tocMobile_ITEo\"><button type=\"button\" class=\"clean-btn tocCollapsibleButton_TO0P\">On this page</button></div><div class=\"theme-doc-markdown markdown\"><header><h1>Getting Started</h1></header><h2 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"benefits-of-stirling-pdf\">Benefits of Stirling PDF<a href=\"#benefits-of-stirling-pdf\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Benefits of Stirling PDF\" title=\"Direct link to Benefits of Stirling PDF\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h2>\n<ul>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Extensive PDF Functionality:</strong> Access 60+ tools, including signing, converting, merging, and more.</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Advanced Customization:</strong> Deep customization, themes, and environment variables.</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Enterprise Features:</strong> SSO, user management, and permission controls.</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Data Security:</strong> Local file processing with automatic deletion post-task.</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Scalability &amp; Automation:</strong> Batch processing with Docker and Kubernetes support.</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>API Integration:</strong> Use APIs for automation and external integrations.</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Open-Source:</strong> Community-driven with frequent updates and GitHub support.</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Multi-Language Support:</strong> Available in 40+ languages with active translations.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"welcome-to-stirling-pdf\">Welcome to Stirling PDF<a href=\"#welcome-to-stirling-pdf\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Welcome to Stirling PDF\" title=\"Direct link to Welcome to Stirling PDF\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h2>\n<div class=\"theme-admonition theme-admonition-tip admonition_xJq3 alert alert--success\"><div class=\"admonitionHeading_Gvgb\"><span class=\"admonitionIcon_Rf37\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 12 16\"><path fill-rule=\"evenodd\" d=\"M6.5 0C3.48 0 1 2.19 1 5c0 .92.55 2.25 1 3 1.34 2.25 1.78 2.78 2 4v1h5v-1c.22-1.22.66-1.75 2-4 .45-.75 1-2.08 1-3 0-2.81-2.48-5-5.5-5zm3.64 7.48c-.25.44-.47.8-.67 1.11-.86 1.41-1.25 2.06-1.45 3.23-.02.05-.02.11-.02.17H5c0-.06 0-.13-.02-.17-.2-1.17-.59-1.83-1.45-3.23-.2-.31-.42-.67-.67-1.11C2.44 6.78 2 5.65 2 5c0-2.2 2.02-4 4.5-4 1.22 0 2.36.42 3.22 1.19C10.55 2.94 11 3.94 11 5c0 .66-.44 1.78-.86 2.48zM4 14h5c-.23 1.14-1.3 2-2.5 2s-2.27-.86-2.5-2z\"></path></svg></span>Upgrading from V1?</div><div class=\"admonitionContent_BuS1\"><p>See the <strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/Migration/Overview\">Migration Guide</a></strong> for what's new and how to upgrade smoothly.</p></div></div>\n<p>Stirling PDF is a locally hosted web application that allows you to perform various operations on PDF files. With 60+ tools, flexible deployment options, and enterprise features, it's the comprehensive PDF solution for individuals and organizations.</p>\n<hr>\n<h2 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"whats-new-in-v2\">What's New in V2<a href=\"#whats-new-in-v2\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to What's New in V2\" title=\"Direct link to What's New in V2\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h2>\n<p>V2 brings major improvements to performance, workflow, and deployment flexibility:</p>\n<ul>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Stateful Processing</strong> - Upload once, use across multiple tools without re-uploading</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Undo &amp; Redo</strong> - Full version history for page editing</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Native Desktop Apps</strong> - Fast startup, \"Open with\" integration, offline capable</li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>In-App Settings</strong> - Configure everything through the UI, no file editing needed</li>\n</ul>\n<hr>\n<h2 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"documentation-guide\">Documentation Guide<a href=\"#documentation-guide\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Documentation Guide\" title=\"Direct link to Documentation Guide\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h2>\n<h3 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"for-individual-users\">For Individual Users<a href=\"#for-individual-users\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to For Individual Users\" title=\"Direct link to For Individual Users\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h3>\n<p><strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/functionality\">Tool Reference</a></strong>\nBrowse all 60+ PDF tools with descriptions</p>\n<hr>\n<h3 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"for-organizations--it-teams\">For Organizations &amp; IT Teams<a href=\"#for-organizations--it-teams\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to For Organizations &amp; IT Teams\" title=\"Direct link to For Organizations &amp; IT Teams\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h3>\n<p><strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/Production-Deployment-Guide\">Production Deployment Guide</a></strong>\nComplete walkthrough: installation - configuration - security - monitoring</p>\n<p><strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/Paid-Offerings\">Paid Offerings (Server &amp; Enterprise)</a></strong>\nExternal databases, Google Drive integration, SSO, advanced monitoring, and priority support</p>\n<p><strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/Configuration/Extra-Settings\">Configuration Options</a></strong>\nAll configuration options for Docker and server deployments</p>\n<hr>\n<h3 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"for-developers--integration\">For Developers &amp; Integration<a href=\"#for-developers--integration\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to For Developers &amp; Integration\" title=\"Direct link to For Developers &amp; Integration\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h3>\n<p><strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/API\">API Documentation</a></strong>\nIntegrate Stirling PDF into your applications and workflows</p>\n<p><strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/Configuration/System and Security\">Configuration</a></strong>\nSSO, certificates, security settings, and more</p>\n<p><strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/Contribute\">Contribute Guide</a></strong>\nHelp improve Stirling PDF - development setup and guidelines</p>\n<hr>\n<h2 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"installation\">Installation<a href=\"#installation\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Installation\" title=\"Direct link to Installation\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h2>\n<p>Choose how you want to run Stirling PDF based on your needs:</p>\n<h3 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"desktop-applications\">Desktop Applications<a href=\"#desktop-applications\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Desktop Applications\" title=\"Direct link to Desktop Applications\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h3>\n<p>Native apps with system integration:</p>\n<table><thead><tr><th>Platform</th><th>Download</th><th>Guide</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><strong>Windows</strong></td><td><a href=\"https://files.stirlingpdf.com/win-installer.exe\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"\">Installer</a></td><td><a class=\"\" href=\"/Installation/Windows Installation\">Windows Guide</a></td></tr><tr><td><strong>Mac</strong> (Universal)</td><td><a href=\"https://files.stirlingpdf.com/mac-installer.dmg\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"\">DMG</a></td><td><a class=\"\" href=\"/Installation/Mac Installation\">Mac Guide</a></td></tr><tr><td><strong>Linux</strong></td><td><a href=\"https://files.stirlingpdf.com/linux-installer.deb\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"\">DEB</a></td><td><a class=\"\" href=\"/Installation/Unix Installation\">Unix Guide</a></td></tr></tbody></table>\n<p><strong>Features:</strong> Fast startup, \"Open with\" integration, no login required, optional server connection for advanced tools</p>\n<hr>\n<h3 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"docker-deployment\">Docker Deployment<a href=\"#docker-deployment\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Docker Deployment\" title=\"Direct link to Docker Deployment\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h3>\n<p>Recommended for server deployments and organizations:</p>\n<p><strong>Quick Start:</strong></p>\n<div class=\"language-bash codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block\" style=\"--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;\"><div class=\"codeBlockContent_QJqH\"><pre tabindex=\"0\" class=\"prism-code language-bash codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);\"><code class=\"codeBlockLines_e6Vv\"><div class=\"token-line\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52);\"><span class=\"token function\" style=\"color: rgb(215, 58, 73);\">docker</span><span class=\"token plain\"> run </span><span class=\"token parameter variable\" style=\"color: rgb(54, 172, 170);\">-d</span><span class=\"token plain\"> </span><span class=\"token punctuation\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52);\">\\</span><span class=\"token plain\"></span><br></div><div class=\"token-line\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52);\"><span class=\"token plain\">  </span><span class=\"token parameter variable\" style=\"color: rgb(54, 172, 170);\">-p</span><span class=\"token plain\"> </span><span class=\"token number\" style=\"color: rgb(54, 172, 170);\">8080</span><span class=\"token plain\">:8080 </span><span class=\"token punctuation\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52);\">\\</span><span class=\"token plain\"></span><br></div><div class=\"token-line\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52);\"><span class=\"token plain\">  </span><span class=\"token parameter variable\" style=\"color: rgb(54, 172, 170);\">-v</span><span class=\"token plain\"> ./stirling-data:/configs </span><span class=\"token punctuation\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52);\">\\</span><span class=\"token plain\"></span><br></div><div class=\"token-line\" style=\"color: rgb(57, 58, 52);\"><span class=\"token plain\">  stirlingtools/stirling-pdf:latest</span><br></div></code></pre><div class=\"buttonGroup_M5ko\"><button type=\"button\" aria-label=\"Copy code to clipboard\" title=\"Copy\" class=\"clean-btn\"><span class=\"copyButtonIcons_IEyt\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" class=\"copyButtonIcon_TrPX\"><path fill=\"currentColor\" d=\"M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z\"></path></svg><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" class=\"copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy\"><path fill=\"currentColor\" d=\"M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z\"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>\n<p><strong>Available versions:</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li class=\"\"><code>latest</code> - Standard version (recommended)</li>\n<li class=\"\"><code>latest-fat</code> - Extra fonts and tools for highest quality conversions and full format support</li>\n<li class=\"\"><code>latest-ultra-lite</code> - Minimal size for resource-constrained environments</li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>Full guide:</strong> <a class=\"\" href=\"/Installation/Docker Install\">Docker Installation Guide</a></p>\n<hr>\n<h3 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"manual-server-setup\">Manual Server Setup<a href=\"#manual-server-setup\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Manual Server Setup\" title=\"Direct link to Manual Server Setup\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h3>\n<p>For bare metal installations or environments without Docker:</p>\n<ol>\n<li class=\"\">Download <code>Stirling-PDF.jar</code></li>\n<li class=\"\">Install Java 25+</li>\n<li class=\"\">Install dependencies (LibreOffice, Tesseract for OCR)</li>\n<li class=\"\">Run the JAR file</li>\n</ol>\n<p><strong>Full guide:</strong> <a class=\"\" href=\"/Installation/Unix Installation\">Unix Installation Guide</a></p>\n<hr>\n<h2 class=\"anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq\" id=\"quick-links\">Quick Links<a href=\"#quick-links\" class=\"hash-link\" aria-label=\"Direct link to Quick Links\" title=\"Direct link to Quick Links\" translate=\"no\">​</a></h2>\n<ul>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Questions?</strong> Check our <strong><a class=\"\" href=\"/FAQ\">FAQ</a></strong></li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Issues?</strong> Report on <strong><a href=\"https://github.com/Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF/issues\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"\">GitHub</a></strong></li>\n<li class=\"\"><strong>Community?</strong> Join our <strong><a href=\"https://discord.gg/Cn8pWhQRxZ\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"\">Discord</a></strong></li>\n</ul></div><footer class=\"theme-doc-footer
